---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or emergency capability for ReliefGrid

labels: enhancement

---

## 💡 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature requested.

## 🚑 Crisis Management Utility
Explain how this feature improves disaster management, field coordination, or agent execution speed.

## 🎨 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this working within the existing architecture.
